phase: P0.6 AUTH UI CONSISTENCY — LOGIN ROUTE + SESSION STORAGE TRUTH

loginRedirectProof.detail: Login page now redirects authenticated users to /dashboard and does not render the login form while auth state is authenticated.

navbarAuthStateProof.detail: Authenticated navbar block now renders only when authState=authenticated AND hasAuthSession() is true.

localStoragePersistenceProof.detail: authStorage keeps canonical keys (parselradar_token, parselradar_user); setAuthSession writes both token and user to localStorage.

staleUserCleanupProof.detail: useAuth enforces storage reconciliation (assertStorageConsistency) and clears stale in-memory user when storage has no complete session.

logoutCleanupProof.detail: logout now clears localStorage and sessionStorage via clearAuthSession + sessionStorage.clear().

hardRefreshProof.detail: Storage-backed hydration contract remains intact; verify:session-persistence passes after auth UI consistency changes.
